Motion To Compel Responses To Sets Of Form And Special Interrogatories, And For Monetary Sanctions Against West Bay Builers,Inc.
Off Calendar Nov-08-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents as to Travelers Casualty and Surety Company of America: Denied as Moot.
The Court makes no ruling as the sufficiency of the responses served after the filing of the motions. The request for monetary sanctions is Denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
